payload.answer: Detected an open loop due to ambiguous relative time references.
citations: Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.

open_loops.description: The timing is ambiguous because 'last Friday' and 'next month' are relative references without an absolute date, so the leaving date/timeframe cannot be resolved durably.
open_loops.evidence: Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.
